lines.en_lit: Rava said: where had ill person in his household, and he slaughtered the mother on Yom Kippur.
Is it prohibited in a case like this? The Merciful One stated you shall not slaughter and this is not slaughter. They say in the West, pushing it the cliff, is its slaughter.
If to God died, that upon which

Rav said: he should sacrifice the second of the first pair and the second of the second pair should graze Rabbi Yoḥanan said: The second of the first pair should graze, he should sacrifice the second of the second pair.
With regard to what do they disagree? Rav holds animals are not rejected. And Rabbi Yoḥanan holds animals are rejected.

What is the reason of Rav? He derives from lacking time. lacking time, is it not although it is unfit now, when it again becomes fit, it seems well, Here, too, no different. Is it comparable? There, it was never fit Here, was fit and was rejected.

Rather, this is the reasoning of Rav: He derives from an animal with a temporary blemish. an animal with a temporary blemish, is it not although it is unfit now, when it again becomes fit, it seems well, Here too, no different.

There, from where do we As it is written: “Because their corruption is in them, there is a blemish in them; blemish is in them that they shall not be accepted; but if their blemish passes, they shall be accepted.
And Rabbi Yoḥanan The Merciful One limited In them, it is they, that are accepted when their blemishes pass, but all once they are rejected they rejected.
And Rav That In them, It is on their own that they are not accepted; but in mixtures are accepted.

As we learned If limbs unblemished with limbs blemished Rabbi Eliezer says: the head of one of them is sacrificed they should sacrifice all the heads, the legs of one of them they should sacrifice all the legs. And the Rabbis say: Even if all of them were sacrificed except for one, should be taken out to the place burning
And the other He derives it from bam, bahem, And the other does not expound bam bahem,
According to Rav, although living beings are not rejected, If he wants this he should sacrifice it, and if he wants that he should sacrifice that.

Rava said: Rav holds in accordance with Rabbi Yosei, who said: mitzva from the first Which Rabbi Yosei If we say Rabbi Yosei regard to containers, as we learned three containers, of which three se’a, with which they collected the chamber. And alef, beit, gimmel were written on them. And it was taught Rabbi Yosei said: Why were alef, beit, gimmel written on them? to know which of them was collected first, to bring from it first, as the mitzva is with the first
Perhaps different there, because at the time when the first was fit the later not fit

Rather, Rabbi Yosei with regard to the Paschal lamb. As we learned one who separated his Paschal lamb and it became lost, and he separated another in its stead, and afterward, the first is found, and they are both standing bring whichever of them he wishes. statement of the Rabbis. Rabbi Yosei says: mitzva with the first
